title: Sloth Space Slide Layout
description: Defines a reusable slide layout template with positioned regions that content fills into.

category.description: Layout category for LLM to select from

description.description: When to use this layout (guidance for LLM)

background_override.description: If set, overrides the slide background using preset colors

regions.description: Positioned content regions on the slide

id.description: Region identifier. Content keys must match this.

role.description: Semantic role — determines which typography/color from preset to use

bounds.description: Position and size in px (base: 1280x720 slide). Values use the MARGIN-RELATIVE coordinate system: x/y are offsets from the preset's margin edges, NOT from the slide edge. The renderer adds margins automatically. Use 0,0 to start at top-left margin corner.

w.description: Width (px). Use 'fill' concept: if omitted, fills to right margin.

h.description: Height (px). Use 'fill' concept: if omitted, fills to bottom margin.

maxLines.description: Max lines of text. Overflow is truncated with ellipsis.

fontSize.description: Maps to preset typography.scale index. Overrides role default.

optional.description: If true, region is hidden when content is not provided
